title: 40 oz Tumbler with Handle, Leakproof Insulated Tumbler with Lid and Straw, Stainless Steel Travel Coffee Mug Cup, Car Cup Holder Friendly, Keep Cold for 30 Hours,Gifts for Women & Men, Light Pink
features: Great Insulation Technology: Tarokitc 40 oz tumbler with handle adopts double-wall vacuum insulation design which will keep your drinks cold for up to 30 hours and hot for up to 12 hours.

Leak-proof Design: Say goodbye to leaks and spills, our tumbler with lid features a well-sealed lid, you can safely put the cup in the backpack even if you shake it violently without worrying about leakage.
Cup-holder Friendly: This 40oz tumbler fits in most car cup holders, and is built for daily use at home and at the office, perfect for outdoor activities,travels.Take us with you!

Super Capacity: Our 40oz travel mug comes with a very large capacity which holds plenty of your favourite drinks such as water, coffee, tea, shakes or juice, allowing you to stay hydrated throughout the day.
High-quality Material: Our tumbler with handle is made of high-quality 304 stainless steel, so its 100% BPA -free and non-toxic which ensures the health and safety of your drinks.
Portable and Durable: This coffee cup is easy to carry around with our sturdy handle, allowing you to have hot waters or cold beverages wherever you go, ideal for travel,work,or outdoor activities.
Easy-to-clean: When it's time to clean, simply rinse it with warm water and soap. It's quick and easy,keeping your tumbler in top condition.
description: Our Tumbler has Excellent insulation performance because of vacuum double walled structure and 304 stainless-steel material, keeping you hot and cold drinks for a long time, It easy for carrying, ideal for long-distance travel,work or outdoor activities. Are you still worried about the cup leaking? Don’t worry because This mug fits friendly in your bag or cup holder without spills or leaks as well as Large capacity can hold enough of your favourite drinks to satisfy your thirst, So please Order now and experience the convenience and high quality!
